steps.title: Notice the squared term becomes zero
Use the vertex shortcut
steps.content: The expression is written in vertex form. When the squared part is $0$, the whole $5(\cdots)^2$ term disappears, leaving only the constant term.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The value is 11/4, which is also $2.75$. The chosen input makes the squared expression zero, so only the constant term remains.
